title: UNESCO alarmed by strikes on Lviv World Heritage Site
content:
UNESCO is deeply alarmed by the 24 March strikes that hit a building in the area of Bernardine Monastery within the World Heritage property of ‘L'viv – the Ensemble of the Historic Centre'.
UNESCO recalls that cultural property is protected under the 1954 Hague Convention and the 1972 World Heritage Convention. All parties must safeguard heritage and refrain from any acts harming cultural property. UNESCO stands ready to support the authorities with assessments, protection ...
creator: wh-info@unesco.org (WH-Info)
